week_time_segment.vow: A decrease in your week-over-week average steps happens. Add a few more steps each day.

month_time_segment.vow: Your average steps are up from last month. Focus on small improvements to boost your health.

six_month_time_segment.vow: Fluctuations in your daily step count are normal. Focus on small improvements to boost your health.

no_data_subtext_name_display: You don't have data to display for the selected date range.

metric_education.title_display: Steps: A Measure Of Daily Movement
metric_education.content_display:
Daily steps are the total number of steps you take each day, providing a fundamental measure of daily movement and physical activity.

Achieving your daily step goal is linked to numerous health benefits. Tracking steps can help reduce the risk of heart disease, obesity, sleep apnea, and improves digestion. Additionally, getting enough daily steps can improve skeletal health, boost overall well-being, and aid in recovery.

Tracking your daily Steps count over time, whether you walk long distances daily or need to break up sitting time, is essential for balancing your recovery and strain.
